description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a flat roof and a clean, modern facade. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored brick, with a darker brick base along one side, and the windows are framed in a subtle, warm tone. The house has multiple large windows on each side, allowing for ample natural light and visibility into the interior rooms. The layout is divided into several rooms, with clear partition walls and open doorways visible from above. The main entryway is located on the darker brick side, distinguished by a single door. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on geometric lines and functional space.
description: A modern, rectangular house with a flat roof, light brick walls, and large windows on all sides. The design is minimalistic, featuring a dark brick base and a clearly defined entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a dark brick base, two large front windows, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two large windows and the light brick facade, with interior partitions visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mix of large and small windows, and a clear view of the room divisions inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent large window and a row of smaller windows, emphasizing the open, airy design.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door set in a dark brick base, no porch or overhang, minimalistic and flush with the facade
